ORDER GRANTING JOINDER TO DEFENDANT ACTALENT, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY ACTION.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ACTALENT, INC.'S (ACTALENT) MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED AS TO ALL CLAIMS AGAINST ALL PARTIES. DEFENDANTS ACTALENT AND CRUISE, LLC (CRUISE) ARE ORDERED TO PAY THE COST OF ARBITRATION PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER: W. TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2023 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration As To It And Stay Action As To It; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ACTALENT, INC. Motion To Compel Arbitration As To It And Stay Action As To It

*SEE WORD MINUTE FOR COMPLETE DETAILS*

Defendant Actalent, Inc.'s (Actalent) motion to compel arbitration is granted as to all claims against all parties. Defendants Actalent and Cruise, LLC (Cruise) are ordered to pay the cost of arbitration pursuant to the terms of the arbitration agreement.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer: W. Trupek, Not reported (302/RBU)

Defendant Cruise Llcs Notice Of Joinder And Joinder To Defendant Actalent, Inc.S Motion To Compel Arbitration As To It And Stay Action As To It; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-14-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CRUISE LLC'S Joinder To Defendant Actalent, Inc.S Motion To Compel Arbitration As To It And Stay Action As To It;

Cruise LLC's unopposed joinder is granted.

order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer: W. Trupek, Not reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2023 Set For Trial On Nov-06-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
